api.secrets.errors.domain_permission_aut.text: You do not have permission to use domain: %{domain}
api.secrets.errors.domain_permission_aut.context: Returned when an authenticated non-owner attempts to share via a domain (apps/api/v2/logic/secrets/base_secret_action.rb)

api.secrets.errors.domain_public_sharing.context: Returned when an anonymous user attempts to share via a custom domain that has public_homepage disabled (apps/api/v2/logic/secrets/base_secret_action.rb)

api.secrets.errors.domain_permission_ano.text: You do not have permission to use domain: %{domain}
api.secrets.errors.domain_permission_ano.context: Returned when an anonymous user on the canonical domain attempts to share via a custom share_domain (apps/api/v2/logic/secrets/base_secret_action.rb)

api.secrets.errors.secret_undecryptable.text: This secret cannot be decrypted right now. The link is still intact — the site operator must restore the encryption key before it can be revealed.
api.secrets.errors.secret_undecryptable.context: HTTP 503 shown to a recipient when the server's encryption key does not match the stored ciphertext (C10/QS-6). The secret is preserved, not consumed; it becomes revealable again once the operator restores the key (lib/onetime/errors.rb SecretUndecryptable)
